style_guide.art_style: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel. Soft, slightly textured brushes are used for coloring and shading, with clear outlines. Colors are vibrant and engaging.
style_guide.color_palette: Sky blues, stormy greys, prairie greens, muddy browns, golden sunlight, bright orange, denim blue, green.
style_guide.lighting: Soft, diffused lighting. It changes from bright daytime to dark, stormy overcast, and then back to bright after-storm light. No harsh shadows.

characters.name: Leo
characters.description: A boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair. He has large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks. He is short and energetic. He wears a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers. He carries a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob.

characters.name: Leo's Dad
characters.description: A man, approximately 38 years old, with deep brown skin and a short beard. He has dark brown eyes and wears a green plaid shirt and khaki pants. He is tall and strong.

pages.narration: Warm air near the ground rushes up really fast, pushing into cooler air high in the sky! It’s like a giant invisible elevator! Look at those huge, puffy cumulonimbus clouds growing taller and darker. The air feels sticky and humid, which is perfect fuel for a big storm.
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. Leo, a boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair, large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks, short and energetic, wearing a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers, carrying a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob, stands in a wide prairie field under a growing, towering cumulonimbus cloud during a humid late afternoon. Soft diffused lighting. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Wide prairie field under a growing cumulonimbus cloud.
visual.action: Leo is looking up at the large cloud.
visual.time_of_day: Late afternoon, humid and partly sunny

pages.narration: The sky suddenly turns an eerie, greenish-grey color—a big warning sign of a severe thunderstorm! Leo’s ears perk up as he hears loud sirens beginning to wail. A wall cloud, which is a low, dark cloud base, is starting to lower from the bottom of the giant storm cloud.
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. Leo, a boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair, large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks, short and energetic, wearing a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers, carrying a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob, is looking up with wide eyes in a darkening prairie landscape. The sky is an ominous greenish-grey. Overcast stormy lighting. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: A darkening prairie landscape with green-grey sky.
visual.action: Leo looks scared as the sirens blare.

pages.narration: A spinning, funnel-shaped cloud starts to poke down from the wall cloud. It twists and turns like a gigantic elephant’s trunk! The wind is roaring, louder than any lawnmower you’ve ever heard! When it touches the ground, that’s when it officially becomes a tornado.
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. Leo, a boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair, large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks, short and energetic, wearing a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers, carrying a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob, and Leo's Dad, a man, approximately 38 years old, with deep brown skin and a short beard, dark brown eyes, wearing a green plaid shirt and khaki pants, tall and strong, are quickly running towards a house in a prairie field as a dark funnel cloud descends. The ground is churning with debris. Dramatic stormy lighting. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: A prairie field with a house in the distance.
visual.action: Leo and his Dad are running to the house for shelter.

choice.question: What should Leo and his Dad do next?

option_a.label: Head down to the basement for safety.
option_a.image_prompt: Digital illustration in the same art style, showing a close-up of a rustic wooden door leading down a dark staircase into a basement. A glowing lamp illuminates the top step. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

pages.narration: They quickly run down the stairs into the cozy, dark basement, away from any windows! Finding a safe interior room on the lowest floor is the smartest move during a tornado. Leo finds a strong spot against a concrete wall.
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. Leo, a boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair, large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks, short and energetic, wearing a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers, carrying a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob, and Leo's Dad, a man, approximately 38 years old, with deep brown skin and a short beard, dark brown eyes, wearing a green plaid shirt and khaki pants, tall and strong, are huddling together in a finished basement corner against a concrete wall. Soft lamplight. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: A finished basement corner with soft lamp light.

pages.narration: The tornado is getting incredibly close now! The whole house begins to shake and rumble violently. Debris is thumping and crashing against the floor above their heads. Leo holds on tight to his Dad, waiting for the super-strong wind to pass.
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. Leo, a boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair, large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks, short and energetic, wearing a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers, carrying a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob, and Leo's Dad, a man, approximately 38 years old, with deep brown skin and a short beard, dark brown eyes, wearing a green plaid shirt and khaki pants, tall and strong, are covering their heads while huddled in the basement. Dust motes dance in the soft lamplight as the walls shake. Dramatic, dark lighting. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: A basement corner, everything is shaking.
visual.action: They are covering their heads and holding on.

option_b.label: Observe the tornado's power from a reinforced storm shelter.
option_b.image_prompt: Digital illustration in the same art style, showing a powerful, dark tornado moving across a prairie landscape with scattered debris. Uprooted trees and broken branches are visible in the foreground. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

pages.narration: They safely watch the tornado from a small, reinforced storm shelter window. The tornado is moving quickly across the open fields, chewing up the landscape with its incredible power. Swirling debris, like tree branches and shingles, is being lifted high into the funnel.
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. Leo, a boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair, large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks, short and energetic, wearing a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers, carrying a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob, and Leo's Dad, a man, approximately 38 years old, with deep brown skin and a short beard, dark brown eyes, wearing a green plaid shirt and khaki pants, tall and strong, are peering out of a small, thick window in a reinforced storm shelter. A dark tornado is visible outside, pulling up debris in the distance. Dramatic stormy lighting. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: Inside a small, reinforced storm shelter.
visual.action: They are looking out the window.

pages.narration: Once the 'all clear' signal is given, Leo and his Dad go outside to safely observe the area. They see a specialized 'Doppler On Wheels' radar truck nearby. Meteorologists use this high-tech equipment to measure the incredible wind speeds inside tornadoes!
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. Leo, a boy, approximately 9 years old, with warm light-brown skin and short curly black hair, large round brown eyes and freckles across his nose and cheeks, short and energetic, wearing a bright orange t-shirt with a cartoon dinosaur, blue denim shorts, and green and white sneakers, carrying a small blue canvas backpack with a key fob, and Leo's Dad, a man, approximately 38 years old, with deep brown skin and a short beard, dark brown eyes, wearing a green plaid shirt and khaki pants, tall and strong, are looking at a specialized Doppler radar truck (DOW) with a large dish on top, parked in a field. Bright post-storm lighting. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.setting: A field after the storm, next to a radar truck.
visual.action: They are observing the scientific equipment.

pages.narration: The super-strong winds of the tornado have finally passed, and the storm clouds are drifting away. Soon, the bright sun is shining again, warming the land! Leo has learned that tornadoes are powerful, spinning columns of wind that form in the biggest supercell storms.
pages.image_prompt: Digital illustration with a friendly, educational feel, soft textured brushes, clear outlines, vibrant colors. A rainbow is visible in the distant, clearing sky. Bright, warm golden sunlight. Full bleed illustration, scene fills the entire frame edge to edge, no borders, no white margins, no frames, no vignette.

visual.action: Leo is looking at the distant clearing sky.
